title: Connectomic comparison of mouse and human cortex
abstract: We performed a connectomic comparison of mouse and human cortical tissue, revealing species-specific differences in interneuron connectivity and synaptic organization, including substantially higher interneuron-to-interneuron connectivity in human cortex.
notes: Approximate entry. From the Helmstaedter lab at MPI for Brain Research. The 2022 Science paper on mouse-human cortical comparison is Loomba's key connectomics contribution. Exact author list may need verification.
